tags.expression:

1,"Normal",
2,"Load On Battery", //On Battery
3,"Load On Internal Bypass", //On Bypass
4,"Load On Maintenance Bypass", //On Bypass
5,"UPS Output Off", //On Bypass
"Unknown") //Else Unknown
